cockpit.d: The captain's chair. Where the bad decisions get made.

engine.d: Propulsion and main power. Upgrades add speed AND +2 reactor output.

fueltank.d: +40 fuel capacity. Passive — no power draw.

cargohold.d: +20 cargo space. Freight pays the bills. Passive.

hydro.d: Grows 2 food per day while powered. Beans, mostly.

medbay.d: Treats the sick, unlocks medical contracts. Needs power to run.

shields.d: -4 damage per enemy hit while powered. Stackable.

armory.d: Arms the crew. Unlocks bounty contracts. Passive.

workshop.d: Powered workbench: raises field repairs from 50% to 60% hull and makes jury-rigs more durable. Full refits still need a yard.

smuggler.d: 10 units of hidden cargo. Unlocks smuggling runs. Patrols may scan you. Passive — that's the point.

luxcabin.d: One luxury berth. Unlocks VIP charters. Cut its power and your VIP will itemize their displeasure.

reactor.d: +3 reactor power. The drive core alone can only feed so many systems.
